calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-03-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Petitioner: Lisa Hu Park, present in pro per for the minor: Lilian Eden Yao, and with Charles Zhang: Mandarin Interpreter, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Lilian Eden Park.
Decree signed in open court.
